---
title: "final assignment"
author: "Shivadarshini Sreekanth"
date: "2026-03-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## DATA CLEANING & HANDLING MISSINGNESS 

```{r}
#libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(randomForest)
library(gbm)
```

```{r}
#reading data
stroke_data <- read.csv("stroke.csv", na.strings = c("N/A", "NA", ""))

head(stroke_data)
str(stroke_data)
dim(stroke_data)
```

```{r}
#removing ID column
stroke_data <- stroke_data %>%
  select(-id)
```

```{r}
#converting variables
stroke_data <- stroke_data %>%
  mutate(
    gender = as.factor(gender),
    hypertension = as.factor(hypertension),
    heart_disease = as.factor(heart_disease),
    ever_married = as.factor(ever_married),
    work_type = as.factor(work_type),
    Residence_type = as.factor(Residence_type),
    smoking_status = as.factor(smoking_status),
    stroke = as.factor(stroke)
  )
#bmi to numeric
stroke_data$bmi <- as.numeric(stroke_data$bmi)
```

```{r}
#missing values
missing_count <- colSums(is.na(stroke_data))
missing_percent <- round(colMeans(is.na(stroke_data)) * 100, 2)

missing_summary <- data.frame(
  Variable = names(stroke_data),
  Missing_Count = missing_count,
  Missing_Percent = missing_percent
)
missing_summary
```

```{r}
#imputing missing BMI using median
median_bmi <- median(stroke_data$bmi, na.rm = TRUE)
stroke_data$bmi[is.na(stroke_data$bmi)] <- median_bmi
```

```{r}
#missing values check after imputing 
missing_count <- colSums(is.na(stroke_data))
missing_percent <- round(colMeans(is.na(stroke_data)) * 100, 2)

missing_summary <- data.frame(
  Variable = names(stroke_data),
  Missing_Count = missing_count,
  Missing_Percent = missing_percent
)
missing_summary
```

## TRAIN & TEST DATA SPLIT

```{r}
set.seed(123)
```

```{r}
#70-30
train_index <- sample(1:nrow(stroke_data), size = 0.7 * nrow(stroke_data))
```

```{r}
#training data
train_data <- stroke_data[train_index, ]
dim(train_data)

#testing data
test_data  <- stroke_data[-train_index, ]
dim(test_data)
```
```{r}
#class distribution
table(stroke_data$stroke)

#class distribution in training data
table(train_data$stroke)

#class distribution in testing data
table(test_data$stroke)
```

## LOGISTIC REGRESSION MODEL

```{r}
# Fit LRM
model_log <- glm(stroke ~ ., data = train_data, family = "binomial")
summary(model_log)

# Predict probabilities on test data
pred_prob_log <- predict(model_log, newdata = test_data, type = "response")

# Converting probabilities to class (0/1) using 0.5 threshold
pred_class_log <- ifelse(pred_prob_log > 0.5, 1, 0)
```

```{r}
#confusion matrix
cm <- table(Predicted = pred_class_log, Actual = test_data$stroke)
cm_standard <- cm[c("1", "0"), c("1", "0")]
cm_standard
```

## RANDOM FOREST MODEL

```{r}
# Fit RFM
model_rf <- randomForest(stroke ~ ., data = train_data, ntree = 100)
summary(model_rf)

# Predict probabilities on test data
pred_prob_rf <- predict(model_rf, newdata = test_data, type = "prob")[,2]

# Converting class
pred_class_rf <- ifelse(pred_prob_rf > 0.5, 1, 0)
pred_class_rf <- as.factor(pred_class_rf)
```

```{r}
# Confusion matrix
cm_rf <- table(Predicted = pred_class_rf, Actual = test_data$stroke)
cm_rf_standard <- cm_rf[c("1", "0"), c("1", "0")]
cm_rf_standard
```

## GRADIENT BOOSTING MODEL

```{r}
train_gbm <- train_data
test_gbm  <- test_data

train_gbm$stroke <- as.numeric(as.character(train_gbm$stroke))
test_gbm$stroke  <- as.numeric(as.character(test_gbm$stroke))

# Fit GBM
model_gbm <- gbm(stroke ~ .,data = train_gbm, distribution = "bernoulli", n.trees = 100,
  interaction.depth = 3, shrinkage = 0.01, n.minobsinnode = 10, verbose = FALSE)

# predict probabilities
pred_prob_gbm <- predict(model_gbm, newdata = test_gbm, n.trees = 100, type = "response")

# convert probabilities to class
pred_class_gbm <- ifelse(pred_prob_gbm > 0.5, 1, 0)
```

```{r}
# confusion matrix
cm_gbm <- table(Predicted = pred_class_gbm, Actual = test_gbm$stroke)
cm_gbm_standard <- table(
  Predicted = factor(pred_class_gbm, levels = c(1, 0)),
  Actual = factor(test_gbm$stroke, levels = c(1, 0))
)

cm_gbm_standard
```
